overview.description: Abstract DB (MariaDB) Repeat with localized variations and times
overview.name: MariaDB Repeat Variations Test

sqlDatabase.comment: Create table for repeat variations test
sqlDatabase.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS repeat_news ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(100) )

sqlDatabase.comment: Insert static data for the loop to read
sqlDatabase.query: INSERT INTO repeat_news (id, title) VALUES (10, 'Global Tech Update'), (20, 'Local Sports Events'), (30, 'Weather Forecast 2026')

sqlDatabase.comment: Check ability to get specific news inside repeat loop
sqlDatabase.query: SELECT id, title FROM repeat_news WHERE id = {{id}}

sqlDatabase.comment: Create append-only table for repeat test
sqlDatabase.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS repeat_simple_log ( run_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, message VARCHAR(50) )

repeat.comment: Run the insert query exactly 5 times

sqlDatabase.comment: Insert a log entry on each iteration
sqlDatabase.query: INSERT INTO repeat_simple_log (message) VALUES ('Loop iteration executed')

sqlDatabase.comment: Verify exactly 5 rows were inserted by the loop
sqlDatabase.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_runs FROM repeat_simple_log
